## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Goodcall.ai and fwd.digital for SEO and marketing strategy in 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Goodcall.ai has seen significant growth (4K to 250K monthly visitors) and landed large enterprise deals through SEO efforts](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers comprehensive SEO and content marketing services, including strategy, content creation, and backlinking](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Bob is planning Goodcall.ai's 2025 budget and strategy, aiming to double down on successful SEO investments](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Marcel is open to a flexible, customized engagement to support Goodcall.ai's growth goals](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)

## Topics

### Goodcall.ai's Recent Growth

  - [Increased from 4K to 250K monthly visitors](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Landed two $180K/year deals through organic search](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Revenue grown from $500K to $1.5M annually](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Team of 6 people, looking to expand marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)

### fwd.digital's Service Offerings

  - [Work streams priced at \~$9K/month, flexible for larger engagements](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - Services include:
      - [Full content strategy and keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [50-100K words of high-quality content per month](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [Custom AI workflows for content generation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [Managing editors and expert strategists (e.g., Kyle from Home Base)](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
      - [Backlinking strategies and outreach](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
      - [SEO testing and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Potential Collaboration

  - [Bob looking to invest in B2B strategy for 2025](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Aims to find 17-20 more large enterprise clients like Night Transit](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Marcel offered to be flexible on pricing and services to support Goodcall.ai's growth](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Discussed possibility of fractional CMO/VP of Marketing support](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)

### Additional Growth Strategies

  - [Suggested implementing warm outreach based on website visitor data](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Recommended using tools like Clearbit for account-based marketing](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
  - [Discussed potential for outbound email campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bob to define Goodcall.ai's specific needs and budget for 2025](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Bob to review fwd.digital's offerings and determine best fit for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Marcel to prepare a customized proposal based on Goodcall.ai's goals and budget](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to discuss detailed engagement plan](https://fathom.video/share/dV-Hdv8mCngHJmgzGyM7st-Y1Waj7UzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
